ddls:
CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each place */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the place is located */,
  "city_type" TEXT /* Type of city (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* County name where the place is located */,
  "census_tract" TEXT /* Census tract number for the place */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for the place */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the place */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_data" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan record */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the place where the loan was made */,
  "total_loans" INTEGER /* Total number of loans made in the place */,
  "lm_loans" INTEGER /* Number of loans made to low-to-moderate income borrowers */,
  "mh_loans" INTEGER /* Number of loans made to minority homeowners */,
  "lmi_tracts" INTEGER /* Number of low-to-moderate income tracts in the place */,
  "pct_loans_to_mh_borrowers" REAL /* Percentage of loans made to minority homeowners in low-to-moderate income tracts */,
  "loan_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was made */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., mortgage, home equity) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_data_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the place where the demographic data applies */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the place */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the place */,
  "pct_minority" REAL /* Percentage of minority population in the place */,
  "pct_female" REAL /* Percentage of female population in the place */,
  "pct_male" REAL /* Percentage of male population in the place */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the place */,
  "pct_high_school_graduates" REAL /* Percentage of high school graduates in the place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., query, report) */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., loan data, demographic data) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Specific data requested by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_data_loan_types" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id", "loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_data_sources" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id", "data_source_id")
)
